sections.heading: Acceptance
sections.body: By using SnapTract you agree to these terms. If you don't agree, please don't use the app.

sections.heading: The service
sections.body: SnapTract lets you scan receipts, track your spending, remember prices, and turn receipts into expense and tax reports you can export.

sections.heading: Your account
sections.body: You sign in with Apple. You're responsible for activity on your account. Keep your device secure.

sections.heading: Subscriptions
sections.body: SnapTract Pro is an auto-renewing subscription billed to your Apple ID. It renews unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the period ends. Manage or cancel it anytime in Settings › Apple ID › Subscriptions, or from within the app.

sections.heading: Your content
sections.body: Your receipts, reports and data are yours. You grant SnapTract permission to store and process them only to provide the service to you.

sections.heading: Acceptable use
sections.body: Don't misuse the app, attempt to break its security, or upload unlawful content.

sections.heading: Disclaimer
sections.body: SnapTract is provided “as is.” AI-extracted data may contain errors — always review amounts before relying on them for tax or reimbursement. SnapTract is not a tax or financial advisor.

sections.heading: Changes
sections.body: We may update these terms; continued use means you accept the changes.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: Questions? Reach us through Contact us in the app, or email support@snaptract.app.
